display.purpose: Hero headlines on landing and marketing pages only. Never inside the product UI.

body.purpose: Default text for the entire product UI. Compact 14px for information-dense financial screens.

label.purpose: Data values, codes, technical labels. JetBrains Mono distinguishes data from narrative.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Default card shadow when tonal layering isn't enough.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus, popovers, small floating panels.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Modals, large floating panels, full-screen overlays.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions and reveals.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Standard transitions: menu open, card hover lift.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Staggered reveal animations for lists and sections.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA for the product UI. Green background, white text, compact padding.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background-color: #5b8c5a; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #3d6b3c; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5b8c5a; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. White background with warm border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background-color: #ffffff; color: #2c241b; border: 1px solid #d4cabd; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #f7f5f0; border-color: #5b8c5a; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5b8c5a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background-color: transparent; color: #2c241b; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #f7f5f0; border-color: #e8e0d5; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5b8c5a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input with warm border and green focus glow.
components.css: .ds-label { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #2c241b; margin-bottom: 0.375rem; } .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #e8e0d5; background-color: #ffffff; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #2c241b; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #aea398; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #5b8c5a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(91, 140, 90, 0.1); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. White background, warm border, no shadow at rest.
components.html:
Account Summary

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e8e0d5; border-radius: 0.5rem; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { padding: 1rem 1.25rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e0d5; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2c241b; } .ds-card-body { padding: 1.25rem; }

components.name: Badge Primary
components.description: Status badge with tinted green background.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; background-color: #f0f7ef; color: #3d6b3c; }

components.name: Badge Success
components.description: Positive status badge with tinted green background.
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; background-color: #ecfdf5; color: #047857; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Sidebar navigation link with hover and active states.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #57534e; transition: all 0.15s ease; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background-color: #efebe3; color: #2c241b; } .ds-nav-link.active { background-color: #e8f0e0; color: #5b8c5a; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Landing CTA Button
components.description: Landing page primary CTA. Olive green, uppercase, tracked.
components.css: .ds-landing-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #3d6b3c; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-landing-cta:hover { background-color: #2d522c; }

narrative.overview:
Sirib's design is a set of reliable, well-crafted tools that feel solid in the hand — like a well-worn ledger or a brass calculator that has never made a mistake. It is calm and professional without being cold. Every surface has a purpose, every interaction is deliberate. The system earns its keep by making daily banking operations faster, clearer, and less error-prone.

The palette is restrained: warm neutrals ground the interface, with a green primary that communicates growth, shared prosperity, and cooperative roots. Shadows are minimal — surfaces structure themselves through tonal layering, not drop-shadows. Typography is set in Inter at a compact 14px body, optimized for dense financial screens where information density is a feature, not a flaw.

This design explicitly rejects corporate banking aesthetics (navy, marble, gilded accents) and generic SaaS dashboard tropes (cold data-entry panels, uniform card grids).
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutral palette with a green functional accent
Compact 14px body for information-dense financial screens
Minimal shadows; hierarchy through tonal layering
Solid, responsive components with clear states
Dark mode that mirrors the warm-light philosophy in low-light settings

rules.name: The Green Rarity Rule
rules.body: The green accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. It appears on primary actions (buttons, active nav items), key data highlights, and brand moments. If a screen has more green than that, it's over-designed. The rarity of the accent is what gives it weight.

rules.name: The Compact-By-Design Rule
rules.body: 14px body text is not a compromise — it is a deliberate choice for information-dense financial screens. The system never falls below 12px (caption / label). Touch targets remain at minimum 44px for interactive elements regardless of text size.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus). A resting card should never look like it's floating — it sits on the page like a tool on a desk.

dos: Do use the green accent sparingly — ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is its weight.
Do use tonal layering (surface → surface-alt → surface-raised) as the primary hierarchy tool before reaching for shadows.
Do keep body text at 14px in the product UI. It is deliberately compact for information density.
Do use JetBrains Mono for data values, codes, and technical labels to distinguish them from narrative text.
Do make interactive elements have minimum 44px touch targets regardless of text size.
Do maintain WCAG 2.1 AA contrast: body text ≥4.5:1 against its background, large text ≥3:1.
Do provide clear, visible focus indicators (2px Green outline with 2px offset) on all interactive elements.
Do respect reduced-motion preferences — all animations degrade to instant transitions.
donts: Don't use corporate banking aesthetics: no navy blue, green gradients, marble textures, or heavy gilded accents.
Don't build generic SaaS dashboard layouts with uniform card grids, tiny uppercase eyebrow labels on every section, or hero-metric templates.
Don't apply shadows to resting surfaces — shadows indicate response to state, not default depth.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Single solid colors only.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't create nested cards — if you need nested containers, use tonal layering instead.
Don't drop below 12px type for any UI text, or below 14px for body copy.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (width, height, position). Animate only transform and opacity.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop blur on semi-transparent backgrounds) as a default treatment.
Don't let heading text overflow its container at any breakpoint — reduce clamp max or rewrite copy.
